hot_topics.summary: Appeal review completed for 2,000+ users, checker live Apr 28, distribution May 8

related_posts.content: SoDEX Testnet Airdrop: Appeal Review Update The SoDEX Testnet airdrop appeal review has been completed. ✅ 2,000+ eligible testnet users have been confirmed 🔍 Eligible users will be able to check their airdrop amount on the SoDEX Testnet starting Apr 28, 12:00 UTC 🎁 Final airdrop distribution is expected to be completed on May 8, 12:00 UTC Check here: https://t.co/1ZCnIrwaG8 If you believe you were missed, the appeal channel remains open. Please submit your appeal as soon as possible. 🔗 Submit here:

💥 UPDATE ON #SODEX TESTNET REWARDS. In the just concluded community call, the #SOSOValue co-founder stated that: - SoDEX testnet review for users who submitted the appeal form has been completed, and over 2,000 users were found eligible. From next week Tuesday (April 28, 2026), users will be able to check their eligibility and allocation. - The testnet appeal form will remain open until May 6, 2026. If you believe you qualify for the airdrop but did not receive an allocation, you can still submit an appeal.
